test.create_query: CREATE TABLE perf_poly_simple (polygon Polygon) ENGINE = Memory

INSERT INTO perf_poly_simple SELECT [arrayMap(i -> ( toFloat64(number % 1000) + [0, 5, 5, 0, 0][i + 1], toFloat64(intDiv(number, 1000)) + [0, 0, 5, 5, 0][i + 1] ), range(5))] FROM numbers_mt(180000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 2
CREATE TABLE perf_poly_complex (polygon Polygon) ENGINE = Memory

INSERT INTO perf_poly_complex SELECT [arrayMap(i -> ( toFloat64(number % 500) + cos(i / 90.0 * pi()) * (1 + number % 10), toFloat64(intDiv(number, 500)) + sin(i / 90.0 * pi()) * (1 + number % 10) ), range(180))] FROM numbers_mt(10000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 2
CREATE TABLE perf_poly_disjoint (polygon Polygon) ENGINE = Memory

INSERT INTO perf_poly_disjoint SELECT [arrayMap(i -> ( toFloat64(number * 100) + [0, 1, 1, 0, 0][i + 1], toFloat64(0) + [0, 0, 1, 1, 0][i + 1] ), range(5))] FROM numbers_mt(2000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 2
CREATE TABLE perf_ring (ring Ring) ENGINE = Memory

INSERT INTO perf_ring SELECT arrayMap(i -> ( toFloat64(number % 1000) + [0, 5, 5, 0, 0][i + 1], toFloat64(intDiv(number, 1000)) + [0, 0, 5, 5, 0][i + 1] ), range(5)) FROM numbers_mt(100000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 2
CREATE TABLE perf_mpoly (mpoly MultiPolygon) ENGINE = Memory

INSERT INTO perf_mpoly SELECT [[arrayMap(i -> ( toFloat64(number % 1000) + [0, 5, 5, 0, 0][i + 1], toFloat64(intDiv(number, 1000)) + [0, 0, 5, 5, 0][i + 1] ), range(5))]] FROM numbers_mt(100000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 2
CREATE TABLE perf_poly_grouped (grp UInt32, polygon Polygon) ENGINE = Memory

INSERT INTO perf_poly_grouped SELECT number % 1000 AS grp, [arrayMap(i -> ( toFloat64(number % 1000) + [0, 5, 5, 0, 0][i + 1], toFloat64(intDiv(number, 1000)) + [0, 0, 5, 5, 0][i + 1] ), range(5))] FROM numbers_mt(100000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 2
CREATE TABLE perf_poly_simple_large (polygon Polygon) ENGINE = Memory

INSERT INTO perf_poly_simple_large SELECT [arrayMap(i -> ( toFloat64(number % 1000) + [0, 5, 5, 0, 0][i + 1], toFloat64(intDiv(number, 1000)) + [0, 0, 5, 5, 0][i + 1] ), range(5))] FROM numbers_mt(500000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 2
CREATE TABLE perf_ring_large (ring Ring) ENGINE = Memory

INSERT INTO perf_ring_large SELECT arrayMap(i -> ( toFloat64(number % 1000) + [0, 5, 5, 0, 0][i + 1], toFloat64(intDiv(number, 1000)) + [0, 0, 5, 5, 0][i + 1] ), range(5)) FROM numbers_mt(500000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 2
CREATE TABLE perf_mpoly_large (mpoly MultiPolygon) ENGINE = Memory

INSERT INTO perf_mpoly_large SELECT [[arrayMap(i -> ( toFloat64(number % 1000) + [0, 5, 5, 0, 0][i + 1], toFloat64(intDiv(number, 1000)) + [0, 0, 5, 5, 0][i + 1] ), range(5))]] FROM numbers_mt(500000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 2
CREATE TABLE perf_poly_grouped_large (grp UInt32, polygon Polygon) ENGINE = Memory

INSERT INTO perf_poly_grouped_large SELECT number % 1000 AS grp, [arrayMap(i -> ( toFloat64(number % 1000) + [0, 5, 5, 0, 0][i + 1], toFloat64(intDiv(number, 1000)) + [0, 0, 5, 5, 0][i + 1] ), range(5))] FROM numbers_mt(500000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 2
test.query: SELECT groupPolygonUnion(polygon) FROM perf_poly_simple FORMAT Null
SELECT groupPolygonUnion(polygon) FROM perf_poly_complex FORMAT Null
SELECT groupPolygonUnion(polygon) FROM perf_poly_disjoint FORMAT Null
SELECT groupPolygonUnion(ring) FROM perf_ring FORMAT Null
SELECT groupPolygonUnion(mpoly) FROM perf_mpoly FORMAT Null
SELECT grp, groupPolygonUnion(polygon) FROM perf_poly_grouped GROUP BY grp FORMAT Null
SELECT groupPolygonUnion(polygon, 0) FROM perf_poly_simple_large FORMAT Null
SELECT groupPolygonUnion(polygon, 1) FROM perf_poly_simple FORMAT Null
SELECT groupPolygonUnion(polygon, 0) FROM perf_poly_complex FORMAT Null
SELECT groupPolygonUnion(ring, 0) FROM perf_ring_large FORMAT Null
SELECT groupPolygonUnion(mpoly, 0) FROM perf_mpoly_large FORMAT Null
SELECT grp, groupPolygonUnion(polygon, 0) FROM perf_poly_grouped_large GROUP BY grp FORMAT Null
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE perf_geometry_union (g Geometry) ENGINE = Memory

INSERT INTO perf_geometry_union SELECT multiIf( number % 3 = 0, arrayMap(i -> ( toFloat64(number % 1000) + [0, 5, 5, 0, 0][i + 1], toFloat64(intDiv(number, 1000)) + [0, 0, 5, 5, 0][i + 1] ), range(5))::Ring::Geometry, number % 3 = 1, [arrayMap(i -> ( toFloat64(number % 1000) + [0, 5, 5, 0, 0][i + 1], toFloat64(intDiv(number, 1000)) + [0, 0, 5, 5, 0][i + 1] ), range(5))]::Polygon::Geometry, [[arrayMap(i -> ( toFloat64(number % 1000) + [0, 5, 5, 0, 0][i + 1], toFloat64(intDiv(number, 1000)) + [0, 0, 5, 5, 0][i + 1] ), range(5))]]::MultiPolygon::Geometry ) FROM numbers_mt(180000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 2
CREATE TABLE perf_geometry_union_grouped (grp UInt32, g Geometry) ENGINE = Memory

INSERT INTO perf_geometry_union_grouped SELECT number % 1000 AS grp, multiIf( number % 3 = 0, arrayMap(i -> ( toFloat64(number % 1000) + [0, 5, 5, 0, 0][i + 1], toFloat64(intDiv(number, 1000)) + [0, 0, 5, 5, 0][i + 1] ), range(5))::Ring::Geometry, number % 3 = 1, [arrayMap(i -> ( toFloat64(number % 1000) + [0, 5, 5, 0, 0][i + 1], toFloat64(intDiv(number, 1000)) + [0, 0, 5, 5, 0][i + 1] ), range(5))]::Polygon::Geometry, [[arrayMap(i -> ( toFloat64(number % 1000) + [0, 5, 5, 0, 0][i + 1], toFloat64(intDiv(number, 1000)) + [0, 0, 5, 5, 0][i + 1] ), range(5))]]::MultiPolygon::Geometry ) FROM numbers_mt(100000) SETTINGS max_insert_threads = 2
test.query: SELECT groupPolygonUnion(g) FROM perf_geometry_union FORMAT Null
SELECT groupPolygonUnion(g, 0) FROM perf_geometry_union FORMAT Null
SELECT grp, groupPolygonUnion(g) FROM perf_geometry_union_grouped GROUP BY grp FORMAT Null
